title: Backpacked TFC
description: This mod adds a comfortable backpack to Minecraft, which is made in the style of TerraFirmaCraft.
body:
If you've been wanting a backpack for your game with the TerraFirmaCraft mod for so long, then this modification is for you!

**If the backpack is in the Curios slot, it can be opened by pressing the B key** (can be changed in the Options->control->key binds)
![Backpack open key](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/bdc2937929cd3276a2714c5aec1018704684ab34.png)

**To create a backpack** you need 5 leather, 1 Bronze Double Sheet, and 3 Burlap Cloth

![Craft](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/fb7448bc1c7fddd5d2e8ce10794c52ea2362bc00.png)
